examples.text: Some researchers assert dogs will one day help doctors diagnose diseases, as some dogs have already demonstrated the ability to detect an assortment of ailments, including diabetes and certain types of cancer.
examples.explanation: 一些研究人员声称，狗有一天将帮助医生诊断疾病，因为有些狗已经显示出检测多种疾病的能力，包括糖尿病和某些类型的癌症。

reviewSessions.example_text: Some researchers assert dogs will one day help doctors diagnose diseases, as some dogs have already demonstrated the ability to detect an assortment of ailments, including diabetes and certain types of cancer.
reviewSessions.feedback: 理解基本正确，表达出“多种疾病”，但“疑难”一层原义中没有。
matched_points: 体现了“多种不同的疾病”这一核心意思
整体语义与例句基本对应
missing_points: 原义没有强调“疑难、复杂、罕见”
更准确可表述为“各种疾病/多种病症”
